item.title: INDO Shares Surge More Than 17% Amid Oil Price Spike — Retail Sees A Replay Of 2022 High
item.description: Shares of INDO hit an intraday high of $86.99 on March 7, 2022, shortly after Russia invaded Ukraine, and sent oil prices soaring.

item.title: Is Amazon Down In The US Right Now?
item.description: More than 21,100 issue reports were raised on Downdetector at the time of writing.

item.title: Tesla’s Dedicated Factory For Its Semi Truck In Nevada Nearing Completion As Deliveries Approach
item.description: As per Tesla’s website, the vehicle will be available in two variants namely standard range and long range.

item.title: Trump Names Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin As DHS Secretary, Replacing Kristi Noem
item.description: The outgoing Noem will become special envoy for The Shield of the Americas.

item.title: Trump Names Oklahoma Senator Markwayne Mullin As DHS Secretary, Replacing Kristi Noem
item.description: The outgoing Noem will become special envoy for The Shield of the Americas.
